learned: SPIKE 5 citation verification: all 8 arXiv IDs resolve and match their claimed titles/topics — 2603.28052 "Meta-Harness: End-to-End Optimization of Model Harnesses" (Yoonho Lee et al., 2026-03-30), 2604.01658 "CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery" (Ao Qu et al., 2026-04-02; title does not say "coevolution" but abstract describes "four co-evolving agents"), 2603.15563 "The PokeAgent Challenge: Competitive and Long-Context Learning at Scale" (Seth Karten et al., 2026-03-16), 2606.09498 "Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves" (Hangfan Zhang et al., 2026-06-08), 2505.22954 "Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents" (Jenny Zhang et al., 2025-05-29), 2502.13138 "AIDE: AI-Driven Exploration in the Space of Code" (Zhengyao Jiang et al., 2025-02-18), 2509.19349 "ShinkaEvolve: Towards Open-Ended And Sample-Efficient Program Evolution" (Lange/Imajuku/Cetin, 2025-09-17), 2507.19457 "GEPA: Reflective Prompt Evolution Can Outperform Reinforcement Learning" (Lakshya A Agrawal et al., 2025-07-25). Lilian Weng's post https://lilianweng.github.io/posts/2026-07-04-harness/ ("Harness Engineering for Self-Improvement", 2026-07-04) still serves; its citation block lists 29 arXiv refs including 5 of the 8 spike IDs (Meta-Harness, Self-Harness, DGM, ShinkaEvolve, GEPA). CORAL, PokeAgent, and AIDE are NOT in Weng's citation block — ADR-0015 must not attribute those three to her post.

evidence.note: VERIFIED — 'Meta-Harness: End-to-End Optimization of Model Harnesses', Yoonho Lee, Roshen Nair, Qizheng Zhang, Kangwook Lee, Omar Khattab, Chelsea Finn; submitted 2026-03-30; outer-loop search over harness code. Matches claim 'Meta-Harness, Lee et al. 2026'.

VERIFIED (title nuance) — 'CORAL: Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery', Ao Qu et al., 2026-04-02. Claim said 'CORAL coevolution'; title says 'Multi-Agent Evolution' but abstract states 'four co-evolving agents improve the best known score from 1363 to 1103 cycles', so the coevolution framing is grounded. Cite the exact title in ADR-0015.

VERIFIED — 'The PokeAgent Challenge: Competitive and Long-Context Learning at Scale', Seth Karten et al., 2026-03-16; two-track Pokemon benchmark (competitive strategic reasoning + long-horizon RPG planning), 100+ teams.

VERIFIED — 'Self-Harness: Harnesses That Improve Themselves', Hangfan Zhang et al., 2026-06-08; agents iteratively refine their own harness, validated on Terminal-Bench-2.0. Matches claim 'Self-Harness, Zhang et al.'.
VERIFIED — 'Darwin Godel Machine: Open-Ended Evolution of Self-Improving Agents', Jenny Zhang, Shengran Hu, Cong Lu, Robert Lange, Jeff Clune; 2025-05-29.
VERIFIED — 'AIDE: AI-Driven Exploration in the Space of Code', Zhengyao Jiang et al., 2025-02-18; LLM tree-search ML-engineering agent.
VERIFIED — 'ShinkaEvolve: Towards Open-Ended And Sample-Efficient Program Evolution', Robert Tjarko Lange, Yuki Imajuku, Edoardo Cetin; 2025-09-17.
VERIFIED — 'GEPA: Reflective Prompt Evolution Can Outperform Reinforcement Learning', Lakshya A Agrawal et al., 2025-07-25.

SERVES — 'Harness Engineering for Self-Improvement', Lilian Weng, 2026-07-04. Citation block has 29 arXiv refs; includes spike IDs 2603.28052, 2606.09498, 2505.22954, 2509.19349, 2507.19457. Does NOT include 2604.01658 (CORAL), 2603.15563 (PokeAgent), 2502.13138 (AIDE).

next: Record all 8 IDs as VERIFIED in ADR-0015's citation-hygiene section, using the exact titles above (e.g. write CORAL's full title 'Towards Autonomous Multi-Agent Evolution for Open-Ended Discovery', not 'coevolution', with an optional abstract quote for the co-evolving-agents claim).

In ADR-0015, source CORAL (2604.01658), PokeAgent (2603.15563), and AIDE (2502.13138) independently — they are NOT in Lilian Weng's 2026-07-04 citation block, so any 'via Weng' attribution for those three would be a provenance error.

Optionally pin the DGM citation with the Unicode title as rendered on arXiv ('Darwin Godel Machine' — arXiv abs page renders it without the umlaut; 'Gödel' is the conventional spelling) so string-match citation linters don't false-flag.

If ADR-0015 wants deep-links into Weng's post for the 5 overlapping IDs, capture a dated snapshot of the post (it's live today, 2026-07-11) since blog citation blocks can be edited without versioning.
